---
title: "Alfred William Pollard"
---

## Alfred William Pollard

**Dates:** (1859-1944)

### Description

bibliographer, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1888)

### Biography

Keeper of the Department of Printed Books at the British Museum, 1919-24.
<br/>

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 11th [1888]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
